LightningComponentBundle.description: Generic parent-child record collection editor for use in Flow screens.

property.name: heading
property.label: Heading
property.description: Heading text for the records section (e.g., Add Contact(s)).

property.name: recordLabel
property.label: Record Label
property.description: Label for the record type (e.g., Contact). Used for Add/Remove button text.

property.name: configKey
property.label: Config Key (Child_Record_Editor_Config__mdt DeveloperName)
property.description: DeveloperName of Child_Record_Editor_Config__mdt row to use for field configuration.

property.name: parentId
property.label: Parent Id
property.description: Id of the parent record (e.g., Account Id, Opportunity Id).

property.name: recordTypeId
property.label: Record Type Id
property.description: Optional. Record Type Id used to resolve picklist/dependent-picklist values. Defaults to object default record type when blank.

property.name: existingRecordsJson
property.label: Existing Records JSON
property.description: Optional. JSON string of existing records to edit. Use 'Get Records JSON for Editor' invocable to build from a Record Collection.

property.name: minRows
property.label: Minimum Rows
property.description: Minimum number of child rows when no existing records. Ignored when existingRecordsJson is provided.

property.name: maxRows
property.label: Maximum Rows
property.description: Maximum number of child rows allowed.

property.name: recordsToCreate
property.label: Records To Create (JSON)
property.description: JSON string representing the records to create.
